PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?venueLabel WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q12349 ; wdt:P135 "7" ^^ xsd:integer ; wdt:P171 ?series .
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q187938 ; wdt:P364 "7" ^^ xsd:integer ; wdt:P585 ?year .
  ?game wdt:P576 ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
